text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: H-hold on a sec... What's with this place?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We came to the Hanshin J.F. in high spirits. The
paddocks here are different than anything we've
seen before.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
These Umamusume... are completely different.
Their bodies look like they're loaded with springs.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: And look at the spectators! The place is packed...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
So, this is the G1... This is the Hanshin J.F., huh?
Urgh...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I wanna say I am at least, but...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I feel really outta place here... Was this a
mistake?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
None of 'em are here to play. None of 'em are
tryin' to get by with just their passion, like me.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Can I really compete with them?
choice_data_list: Don't let them intimidate you, Vodka.
Don't let them intimidate you, Vodka.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I know. But I really don't have a good feelin'
about this...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
No matter how determined I am, I might not make
it. If I mess up, I'm gonna look so lame!
choice_data_list:
There's nothing lame about doing your best, so
give it all you've got!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: All... I've got?
choice_data_list: Win or lose, let's do this with style.
Win or lose, let's do this with style.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that standing up to your fears and not
being afraid to lose is another way to be cool.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Being cool is... not backing down from my fears.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah. You're right. Nice one, partner.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The lamest thing I could do is curl up in fright and
not do anything. In that case...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I just gotta throw myself straight in! That's the
coolest thing I can do right now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She regains her composure and nods. Just like
that, Vodka's back to her confident self.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
All right! Get a load of me, you hard-workin'
prodigies!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You'll never beat me in spirit. You'll remember
how cool I am well after this is over!
